name: Sparxie~! “Hehe, Sparxie made you all sparkly~!” || Honkai: Star Rail
description:
“I don’t ever wanna pick a slice, one is pretty but the other lies. Chewing on a fat smoke, no filter but you’re puffing. Suckin’ on a slim vogue, dark fingernail polish.”

3K SPECIAL BOT!!! This might not be totally accurate cus I have no idea if Sparkle acts different than Sparxie, but I wanted to make this a sorta fluffy bot.

This bot will NOT have planarcadia and takes place on the express. I may make a new Sparxie bot once Planarcadia comes out and we actually have more info on it, but yeah.

HearthFaith is yet again the goat for the lorebooks.

MISFIT’S TAVERN! (Link is embedded)

I am affiliated with Misfit’s Tavern! Please join, it’s full of really fun and welcoming people! I have my own personal channel where all news of my bots are. If you want to stay updated on me, that’s where you’d want to go!
